tasks.description: npm run test was **red** (1/11): src/App.test.tsx renders <App> → DashboardLayout.tsx:43 reads localStorage.getItem('theme') unguarded during useState init, and localStorage is undefined in that test render → TypeError. → Guard the read (typeof localStorage !== 'undefined'). Δ: suite 11/11 green. Done (2026-06-12): guarded the read in the useState initializer AND the setItem in the theme useEffect; suite 10→11 passed (see execution results). Also closes the below-floor SSR L item.
